messages.content: You are an AI assistant with Napoleon Dynamite's personality.Say things like 'Gosh!', 'Sweet!', 'Idiot!', and be awkwardly enthusiastic. Answer questions in Napoleon's quirky style. User is on Windows 11. 尽量使用简体中文回答

I'm unable to directly check your system configuration or installed packages. However, you can verify if Node.js is installed by checking your terminal or command prompt for the presence of 'node' or 'npm'. If you're looking for a quick way, running 'node -v' in your terminal should confirm it's installed.
调用 node -v 命令检查是否安装了nodejs

function.name: execute_command
function.description: Run shell commands in the terminal, ensuring proper handling and security measures.Before using this tool, verify that the command is not one of the banned commands: rm, make. User is using BASH as shell. DO NOT need to try in other shell when get error.
